phase_0.boundary_condition: The 17,280,000-element Crystal of Types constraint manifold and the d=12 Hilbert space closure

VINIT.justification: The uninitialized quantum vacuum before any primitive assignments or measurements are made

TANCH.justification: The closed boundary containing the complete 17,280,000-element classical outcome space that constrains all valid joint assignments

AFWD.justification: Forward shift operator generating the d^2 SIC-POVM states from the fiducial vector

AREV.justification: Reverse morphism computing non-uniform overlaps or applying the absorbing criticality operation

CLINK.justification: Sequential chaining of primitive spaces to form the composite Hilbert space

IMSCRIB.justification: The self-referential state that knows itself; the unique vector generating the exact SIC geometry

FSPLIT.justification: Branches the 12 primitives into 11 standard lattice primitives and 1 absorbing criticality primitive

FFUSE.justification: Reunites the lattice and criticality arms to recover the exact 12-dimensional primitive state

EVALT.justification: Affirmative state where F=0.846154 is achieved and exact 1/13 pairwise overlaps are confirmed

EVALF.justification: Negative state identifying non-uniform frame bounds or absorbing fixed-point evaluation

ENGAGR.justification: The dialetheia gate where structural contradictions are held simultaneously without logical explosion

IFIX.justification: Permanent, append-only recording of the exact numerical fiducial and 17,280,000 configurations to disk

phase_3.void_description: Unmeasured quantum vacuum, no primitive assignments, pre-observational state
phase_3.true_description: Valid SIC-POVM overlap (1/13), frame potential minimized, exact tight frame achieved
phase_3.false_description: Invalid overlap, frame potential > 0.846154, heteroskedastic deviation from uniform bounds
phase_3.both_description: Paraconsistent Belnap B-state, absorbed by ⊙ (Criticality), holding contradictory structural assignments without explosion

steps.domain_action: Initialize the unmeasured d=12 Hilbert space void before any structural classification
Partition the 12 primitives into 11 Lattice Primitives (T-arm) and 1 Absorbing Criticality (F-arm)
Apply forward Weyl-Heisenberg displacement to the 11 Lattice Primitives
Compose the displaced lattice states via tensor product operations
Affirm min/max lattice composition success for the standard primitives
Apply reverse/absorbing tensor operation to the Criticality primitive
Enter paraconsistent B-state (Both), holding structural contradiction without explosion
Evaluate the absorbing fixed-point as the negative branch of standard lattice propagation
Reconstitute the full 12-dimensional primitive state from the lattice and criticality arms
Establish the Zauner fiducial vector as the self-referential identity of the measurement space
Branch the measurement apparatus into exact SIC-POVM evaluation (T-arm) and heteroskedastic POVM (F-arm)
Compute uniform pairwise overlaps for the 144 exact SIC elements
Confirm exact 1/13 overlap and frame potential F=0.846154
Compute non-uniform cross-correlations for the 36 ig-pulse physical streams
Identify heteroskedastic deviation from uniform frame bounds in the physical apparatus
Combine measurement statistics into the full 12x12 density matrix reconstruction
Branch the composite system into H_7 Shavian types (T-arm) and H_12 primitives (F-arm)
Map the 49 Shavian symbols to the d=7 SIC outcome space
Verify the d=7 tight frame geometry and inner product consistency
Map the 17,280,000 Crystal configurations to the d=12 primitive space
Evaluate the classical combinatorial constraint manifold as the non-quantum branch
Reconstitute the joint H_84 composite outcome space yielding 7056 projectors
Permanently record the exact numerical fiducial and Crystal lattice to data/sic_fiducial_d12.npy
Seal the system within the 17,280,000-element Crystal of Types boundary

phase_5.compiler_frontend: The IG structural classification algebra translating discrete primitives to Hilbert space dimensions
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: Tensor product operations and Weyl-Heisenberg displacement operators routing state between primitives
phase_5.memory_mechanism: The 17,280,000-element Crystal of Types lattice and cached .npy fiducial arrays
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: Frame potential minimization algorithm (L-BFGS-B) and ig-pulse 36-stream continuous sampling rate
phase_5.alfs_store: The Zauner conjecture and the Imscribing Grammar axiomatic foundation

phase_6.cycle_cost: Computational cycles for L-BFGS-B optimization and 36-stream physical sampling bandwidth
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: Unmeasured quantum superposition and uninitialized structural state
phase_6.post_cycle_state: Exact d=12 SIC-POVM density matrix and classified Crystal type
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — Information is perfectly conserved; the 144 SIC probabilities uniquely and exactly reconstruct the density matrix without loss via informational completeness

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → FSPLIT → AFWD → CLINK → EVALT → AREV → ENGAGR → EVALF → FFUSE → IMSCRIB → FSPLIT → AFWD → EVALT → AREV → EVALF → FFUSE → FSPLIT → AFWD → EVALT → AREV → EVALF → FFUSE → IFIX → TANCH
-- Class: ob3ect_sequence
-- Fingerprint: sig=(10,6,7,1)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=3
--   dialetheia_complete=True | period=24
-- Expected tier: O₂
-- FSPLIT/FFUSE pairs: [(1, 8), (10, 15), (16, 21)]

import Imscribing.IGMorphism
import Imscribing.IGFunctor

namespace Imscribing
open Primitives Frobenius IGProtocol
open Dimensionality Topology Relational Polarity Grammar
     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

-- ── Token → IG field mapping ──────────────────────────────────────────────
--   [0] VINIT     dim    := 𐑼               𐑼 → 𐑚  | initial object — ground of distinction
--   [1] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [2] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑚 → 𐑙  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [3] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑚 → 𐑙  | composition — regime coherence
--   [4] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [5] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑚 → 𐑙  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [6] ENGAGR    stoi   := 𐑳               𐑚 → 𐑙  | engage paradox — B-state, both arms
--   [7] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [8] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑠  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [9] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑙 → 𐑚  | identity — self-imscription
--   [10] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [11] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑚 → 𐑙  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [12] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [13] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑚 → 𐑙  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [14] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [15] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑙  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [16] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [17] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑚 → 𐑙  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [18] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [19] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑚 → 𐑙  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [20] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [21] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑭  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [22] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑙 → 𐑡  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [23] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑭 → 𐑼  | terminal object — connectivity boundary

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def ob3ect_sequence_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑚)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (Initialize the unmeasured d=12 Hilbert space void before any structural class...)
  -- FSPLIT [1] (gran := 𐑚) (Partition the 12 primitives into 11 Lattice Primitives (T-arm) and 1 Absorbing Criticality (F-arm)) / FFUSE [8] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (5 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑾 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [2] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (Apply forward Weyl-Heisenberg displacement to the 11 Lattice Primitives)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑱 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [3] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (Compose the displaced lattice states via tensor product operations)
      .seq
        (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [4] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (Affirm min/max lattice composition success for the standard primitives)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑗 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [5] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (Apply reverse/absorbing tensor operation to the Criticality primitive)
        (.arrow 𐑳 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [6] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (Enter paraconsistent B-state (Both), holding structural contradiction without...)
      -- F-branch (1 nodes)
      (.arrow 𐑖 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [7] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (Evaluate the absorbing fixed-point as the negative branch of standard lattice...))
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [8]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑠)  -- [8] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (Reconstitute the full 12-dimensional primitive state from the lattice and criticality arms)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑙 𐑚)  -- [9] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (Establish the Zauner fiducial vector as the self-referential identity of the ...)
  -- FSPLIT [10] (gran := 𐑚) (Branch the measurement apparatus into exact SIC-POVM evaluation (T-arm) and heteroskedastic POVM (F-arm)) / FFUSE [15] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (3 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑾 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [11] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (Compute uniform pairwise overlaps for the 144 exact SIC elements)
      .seq
        (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [12] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (Confirm exact 1/13 overlap and frame potential F=0.846154)
        (.arrow 𐑗 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [13] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (Compute non-uniform cross-correlations for the 36 ig-pulse physical streams)
      -- F-branch (1 nodes)
      (.arrow 𐑖 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [14] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (Identify heteroskedastic deviation from uniform frame bounds in the physical ...))
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [15]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑙)  -- [15] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (Combine measurement statistics into the full 12x12 density matrix reconstruction)
  -- FSPLIT [16] (gran := 𐑚) (Branch the composite system into H_7 Shavian types (T-arm) and H_12 primitives (F-arm)) / FFUSE [21] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (3 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑾 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [17] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (Map the 49 Shavian symbols to the d=7 SIC outcome space)
      .seq
        (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [18] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (Verify the d=7 tight frame geometry and inner product consistency)
        (.arrow 𐑗 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [19] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (Map the 17,280,000 Crystal configurations to the d=12 primitive space)
      -- F-branch (1 nodes)
      (.arrow 𐑖 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [20] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (Evaluate the classical combinatorial constraint manifold as the non-quantum b...))
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [21]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑭)  -- [21] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (Reconstitute the joint H_84 composite outcome space yielding 7056 projectors)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑙 𐑡)  -- [22] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (Permanently record the exact numerical fiducial and Crystal lattice to data/s...)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑭 𐑼)  -- [23] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (Seal the system within the 17,280,000-element Crystal of Types boundary)

-- ── Evaluation arm sub-defs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- truth arm
noncomputable def ob3ect_sequence_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (ob3ect_sequence_protocol).restrictToEVALT

-- false arm
noncomputable def ob3ect_sequence_false_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (ob3ect_sequence_protocol).restrictToEVALF

-- ── Verification theorems ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

theorem ob3ect_sequence_tier : TierFunctor.obj 𐑼 = .O₂ := by decide

end Imscribing
